Blistercard containing 6 permanent pencils in assorted colours
Product information
Waterproof wood-cased pencil in 6 colours
For opaque drawing and writing on almost all surfaces even on dark or transparent ones,                e.g. paper, plastic, metal, glass, wood, leather and stone
Does not bleed through paper
Wood from certified, sustainably managed forests
Sharpener recommendation: Mars double-hole sharpener 510 25 or tub sharpener 512 002 for                ideal sharpening results

10820BK6-C
Colours:
Made in Germany
Made in Germany
Universal pen / marker
For labelling and marking of just about every material
Lightfast
High level of lightfastness: Writing is still clearly legible years later!
waterproof
Waterproof
PEFC
Wood and wood products with the PEFC label are certified as originating from forests                managed in an ecologically, economically and socially sustainable manner.
